title: Score Snapshot
description: An immutable, versioned record of a single dimension score for one NPI in one refresh cycle. Append-only — never overwritten. Produced at Stage 3 (Score) of the data refresh pipeline and written to the score store at Stage 4 (Store).

npi.description: 10-digit National Provider Identifier. Primary key for the provider.

dimension.description: The scoring dimension this snapshot covers. Standard values: safety, quality, utilization, experience, cost, composite. Bundle-level rows use the format bundle:<specialty_slug> (e.g., bundle:cardiology).

score.description: Computed score on a 0–100 scale. Null if the dimension could not be scored in this refresh cycle (e.g., source unavailable, scoring stage failure).

confidence_tier.description: Confidence in the score based on data completeness and recency. 1 = high, 2 = medium, 3 = low. Null when score is null.

sub_scores.description: Dictionary of component scores that roll up into the top-level score. Keys are sub-score names (strings); values are numbers (0–100) or null. Null at the top level when sub-score decomposition is not applicable for this dimension.

source_versions.description: Dictionary mapping each source_id used in computing this score to the artifact path or datestamp of the specific file ingested (e.g., {"oig_leie": "2026-04-01", "nppes": "2026-04-06"}). At least one source must be present.

methodology_version.description: Semantic version of the scoring methodology applied to produce this snapshot (e.g., 2.1.0). Must match a tagged release in the methodology documentation.

scored_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC datetime at which the score was computed (pipeline Stage 3 completion). Set by the system; never client-supplied.

refresh_cycle_id.description: Unique identifier for the pipeline run that produced this snapshot (e.g., 2026-Q2, 2026-Q2-correction). Used to group all NPI × dimension snapshots from the same run.

trend.description: Trend category computed over the last N refresh cycles (default 4). improving: score increased ≥5 pts; stable: change <5 pts; declining: score decreased ≥5 pts; new: fewer than 2 scored snapshots available; insufficient_data: dimension was unscored in the most recent cycle. Null if trend computation has not yet been run for this snapshot.

change_from_prior.description: Signed numeric delta between this snapshot's score and the prior cycle's score for the same NPI × dimension. Positive = improvement, negative = decline. Null if there is no prior scored snapshot or if the current score is null.

change_attributions.description: List of zero or more causes explaining the score change since the prior cycle. Empty array when change_from_prior is 0 or null.
